revision.comment: /* top */orphaning per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2019 January 4#Template:Underpopulated category]], plus AWB gen fixes, removed: {{Popcat}}
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:42:10
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
Text replacement - "Tier 2 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Portal|Japan}} {{cat main|Aizuwakamatsu}} {{Commons category}} [[Category:Cities in Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]] [[en:Category:Aizuwakamatsu]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:会津若松市]] [[ar:Category:أيزواكاماتسو (فوكوشيما)]] [[commons:Category:Aizuwakamatsu]] [[de:Category:Aizu-Wakamatsu]] [[fa:Category:آیزوواکاماتسو، فوکوشیما]] [[it:Category:Aizuwakamatsu]] [[ko:Category:아이즈와카마쓰시]] [[pt:Category:Aizuwakamatsu]] [[th:Category:ไอซูวากามัตสึ]] [[zh:Category:會津若松市]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: {{Portal|Japan}} {{cat main|Aizuwakamatsu}} {{Commons category}} [[Category:Cities in Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]] [[en:Category:Aizuwakamatsu]] [[en:Category:Aizuwakamatsu]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:会津若松市]] [[ar:Category:أيزواكاماتسو (فوكوشيما)]] [[commons:Category:Aizuwakamatsu]] [[de:Category:Aizu-Wakamatsu]] [[fa:Category:آیزوواکاماتسو، فوکوشیما]] [[it:Category:Aizuwakamatsu]] [[ko:Category:아이즈와카마쓰시]] [[pt:Category:Aizuwakamatsu]] [[th:Category:ไอซูวากามัตสึ]] [[zh:Category:會津若松市]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8229538)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
